_fixture_meta.source: DOCS-DERIVED, LAYER-2 RECONCILED (2026-06-26). 'chargeback' is a verified action literal (Paddle docs + paddle-go-sdk AdjustmentActionChargeback). The single-event simulator only offered a generic refund adjustment, so the chargeback ACTION string is docs-verified rather than simulator-captured.
_fixture_meta.reconcile: RESOLVED (docs): action='chargeback' is a real enum value; a chargeback is a forced bank reversal so it is created already 'approved' (no pending_approval gate, unlike a customer-requested refund). NOTE the related-but-EXCLUDED actions 'chargeback_reverse' and 'chargeback_warning'/'chargeback_warning_reverse' must NOT claw back — only {refund, chargeback} are allowlisted.
_fixture_meta.locks: data.action='chargeback' (allowlisted alongside 'refund'), data.status='approved', data.transaction_id links to a purchases row
